title: Mahindra & Mahindra Advisory Limited is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Mahindra & Mahindra Advisory Limited is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Quality Control Engineer with drive and ambition, Mahindra & Mahindra Advisory Limited in Ahmedabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Mahindra & Mahindra Advisory Limited:
Mahindra & Mahindra Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra & Mahindra Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
